type_:Operand.docs:
Tests enum name and value can be 
different.

properties.name: name
properties.docs:
The user's name. This name is unique to each user. A few examples are included below:
 - Alice
 - Bob
 - Charlie

type_:User.docs:
A user object. This type is used throughout the following APIs:
  - createUser
  - getUser

endpoints.name: getuser

pathParameters.name: userId
pathParameters.docs:
The ID of the user to retrieve.
This ID is unique to each user.

allPathParameters.name: userId
allPathParameters.docs:
The ID of the user to retrieve.
This ID is unique to each user.

endpoints.docs:
Retrieve a user.
This endpoint is used to retrieve a user.

endpoints.name: createuser

properties.name: name
properties.docs:
The name of the user to create.
This name is unique to each user.

properties.name: age
properties.docs:
The age of the user.
This property is not required.

endpoints.docs:
Create a new user.
This endpoint is used to create a new user.
